div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 948px; height: 1px; padding-top: 737px; margin-left: 881px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Tahoma; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

path.style: stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); animation: 500ms linear 0s infinite normal none running ge-flow-animation-pk9GQ-s0Qh4NmQpNopKl; stroke-dashoffset: 16;
